meta.title: Windsurf Tarragona · Nautical School & Water Activities in Playa Larga
meta.description: Nautical school and water sports center in Playa Larga, Tarragona. Windsurf, wing-foil, paddle surf, sailing, catamaran, Catalan boat, water skiing and wakeboard courses. Banana boat, kayak, boat rides. +20 years on the Costa Dorada.

hero.sub1: Windsurf · Wing-Foil · Paddle Surf · Sailing · Catamaran · Catalan Boat
hero.sub2: Banana Boat · Kayak · Water Skiing · Boat rides

banana.pill: 🍌 The most fun experience in the Mediterranean
banana.desc: The most fun experience in the Mediterranean. Hold on tight, laugh non-stop and create memories that last a lifetime.

windsurf.name: Windsurf
windsurf.desc: The classic. You, a board and the wind. Master your balance and sail with total freedom.
windsurf.seoDesc: Windsurfing course in Playa Larga, Tarragona. Certified FVE/RFEV instructors, all levels. Learn to windsurf on Spain's Costa Dorada with +20 years of experience.

wing-foil.name: Wing-Foil
wing-foil.desc: New! Fly over the water with a wing and a foil. 3-phase course: wing + large board, foil + motorboat, wing + foil. The newest sensation on the sea.
wing-foil.seoDesc: Wing-foil course in Playa Larga, Tarragona. Learn wing-foil in 3 progressive phases with certified instructors. Nautical school with +20 years on Spain's Costa Dorada.

paddle-surf.name: Paddle Surf / Surf
paddle-surf.desc: Discover paddle surf, the trending sport. Also surf and body-surf classes. All levels at Playa Larga.
paddle-surf.seoDesc: Paddle surf and surf lessons in Playa Larga, Tarragona. SUP, surf and body-surf courses for all levels with equipment included. +20 years on Spain's Costa Dorada.

esqui-wake.name: Water Skiing / Wake
esqui-wake.desc: Water skiing and wakeboard towed by our motorboat. Pure adrenaline on the water, for beginners and advanced riders.
esqui-wake.seoDesc: Water skiing and wakeboard in Playa Larga, Tarragona. 10-minute rides and mini-courses with professional motorboat. All levels on Spain's Costa Dorada.

vela.name: Sailing
vela.desc: Learn sailing techniques. Strategy, wind and the sea as your teacher.
vela.seoDesc: Sailing course in Tarragona, Spain. Learn to sail in Playa Larga with certified instructors. Beginner and advanced classes on the Costa Dorada.

catamaran.name: Catamaran
catamaran.desc: Sail a light catamaran. Speed, teamwork and adrenaline.
catamaran.seoDesc: Catamaran course in Playa Larga, Tarragona. Sail a dinghy catamaran with certified instructors. Individual and group classes on the Costa Dorada.

patin-catalan.name: Catalan Boat
patin-catalan.desc: The traditional boat of our coast. Unique in the world, pure Mediterranean identity.
patin-catalan.seoDesc: Catalan boat course in Tarragona. Learn to sail this traditional Costa Dorada vessel in Playa Larga. Unique and authentic experience.

banana-boat.name: Banana Boat
banana-boat.seoDesc: Banana boat ride in Playa Larga, Tarragona. €18/person, 12 minutes of fun. Up to 10 people. The most fun water activity on the Costa Dorada.

kayak.name: Kayak
kayak.seoDesc: Kayak rental in Playa Larga, Tarragona. From €25/h, up to 4 seats. Explore the Tarragona coast by kayak. No experience needed, all ages welcome.

alquiler-windsurf.name: Windsurf Rental
alquiler-windsurf.seoDesc: Windsurf equipment rental in Playa Larga, Tarragona. €25/hour. Boards and sails for all levels on the Costa Dorada.

alquiler-surf.name: Paddle Surf / Surf Rental
alquiler-surf.seoDesc: Paddle surf and surfboard rental in Playa Larga, Tarragona. From €22/hour. Quality SUP, surf and body-surf equipment on Spain's Costa Dorada.

paseos-barco.name: Boat Rides
paseos-barco.seoDesc: Boat rides in Tarragona. €185/hour, up to 6 people with skipper. Trips along the Playa Larga coast and Costa Dorada.

donut.name: Donut
donut.seoDesc: Inflatable donut ride in Playa Larga, Tarragona. Fun and adrenaline towed by speedboat on the Costa Dorada. All ages.

big-paddle-surf.name: Big Paddle Surf
big-paddle-surf.seoDesc: Big Paddle Surf in Playa Larga, Tarragona. €100/hour for up to 12 people. Perfect group activity for friends, companies and parties on Spain's Costa Dorada.

aquamarina.name: Aquamarina
aquamarina.seoDesc: Aquamarina in Playa Larga, Tarragona. €75/hour for 5 people. Group water fun on Spain's Costa Dorada. All ages.

team-building.title: Team Building
team-building.desc: Strengthen your team with the challenge of the sea

amigos.title: Friends
amigos.desc: Custom nautical adventure for your group

despedidas.title: Hen & Stag Parties
despedidas.desc: The most different and memorable party

items.text: We were a school group of 40 people, 16 of whom were French. The pre-activity coordination was fantastic, 100% trust. The activity was spectacular — great treatment, very professional staff and so much fun! I recommend it 100%
items.name: Anna López

items.text: We did several family activities with the kids — Banana Boat and paddle surf — and it was great! Very well organised, the explanations, everything! The guys are lovely!!! Jose is amazing!! Congrats to your team!! We'll be back!!!!
items.name: Olivia Pereda

items.text: We spent a fantastic morning practising foil with the motorboat. The instructors were very professional and always attentive to making sure we all learned as much as possible. Highly recommended!
items.name: artoleta

items.text: Excellent team. I found them on Google, sent a message and Eneko replied — very kind, explained everything perfectly and recommended where to park. When we arrived the whole team was wonderful. We had an amazing time. I highly recommend the Big Paddle, just as Eneko suggested — it was brilliant. We were lucky to find Eneko on the water too, who filmed a great video we'll treasure forever. A hen party to remember thanks to them. Thank you guys, can't wait to come back.
items.name: Gloria González

contacto.subtitle: Come to Playa Larga. We're waiting for you.
contacto.mapAddress: Ctra. N-340, Km 1168 · Camping Las Palmeras
